title: Hiram Maxim
content:
From Hiram Maxim's hair you'd think
    His specialty was spilling ink--
    You'd never dream he'd spilt more blood
    Than any one man since the Flood.
meaning:
"Hiram Maxim" is a quintessential example of Oliver Herford's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
